name: R W Transportation
fit_notes: Very small (8 employees, ~$846K revenue) at a residential SW Atlanta address (4635 Orkney Ln SW). No web presence, no school-bus signal located. Likely a micro NEMT/paratransit van operator rather than a yellow-bus contractor; sub-scale and uncertain fit for Summit tuck-in.

fit_notes: Tiny operator (9 employees, ~$612K revenue) in West Palm Beach. Common 'VIP' name shared with several local limo/medical transport firms; no school-bus or special-needs school contracting confirmed. Sub-scale and ambiguous identity make Summit fit very weak.
